steps.title: Use surface depth
steps.content: At the surface of the copper sample, the depth is $t=0$ millimeters.

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Substitute $0$ for $t$ and evaluate completely:
$$f(0)=640(0.5)^{0/15}=640(0.5)^0=640(1)=640$$
The estimated number of particles is $640$. The answer is A.
